description: Fleet telematics with multi-WAN bonding and ELD regulatory compliance.
challenge: Long-haul trucking requires reliable connectivity across multiple states, intermittent dead zones, and strict ELD (Electronic Logging Device) compliance even during network outages.
response: VITO bonds cellular + satellite links, stores ELD events locally during dead zones, and replays them when connectivity returns. STOW maintains immutable audit trail for regulatory inspection.
result: Continuous ELD compliance, seamless coverage across dead zones, and reduced paperwork audits.
